issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents opponent's Characters from being rested, not rests them. This requires a 'GiveKeyword' action with keyword 'CannotBeRested' or similar restriction keyword, with duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' to match 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'.
Missing duration specification. Text 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' indicates duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not permanent.
The 'Rest' action for Self should have 'optional':true since text says 'You may rest'.
